gate1_cleaned_data_acceptance.notes: 326/326 files parsed (builder hard-fails on mismatch); unique grain; the 12 legacy 2026-06-06 notes were backfilled with signal_title_zh/en + paywall from the daily report Signal Map on 2026-07-22 (matched by source_url, 12/12) — missingness now 0

gate2_chart_recommendation_review.notes: column (non-contiguous time-series, stated in caption), 2x horizontal bar (category comparison); pie/map/line rejected with reasons; linear scale from 0, no truncation, no min-width inflation. 2026-07-23: charts became cross-filter live — each chart excludes its own dimension's filter (faceted semantics documented in chart-spec.json cross_filter); fixed row order prevents misleading reorder animation; true zeros render zero-length with count text

gate3_audience_narrative_review.evidence: index.html captions are computed at runtime from live data (bilingual zh/en); they describe visible pattern + interaction only; caveats section states selection bias (curated backfill, non-contiguous days) and title-fallback limitation; no causal/advisory claims

verification.browser: Playwright (Chromium) against http://localhost:8765 + live GitHub Pages
verification.data_loaded: 326 items; 20 daily columns; 8 category bars; 9 region bars
verification.tooltip: hover shows label + count + share% (e.g. 'AI 96 則 / items · 29.4%')
verification.click_filter_sync: category bar click sets select to 'AI' → 96/326 matches; toggle off restores
verification.keyboard: chart bars/columns are native <button> (tab-focusable, Enter fires); record rows role=button with Enter/Space expand — verified
verification.detail_view: expanded record shows summary, key issue (zh), full clickable source_url, meta, stakeholders/tags
verification.bilingual: narrow-rwd qa_narrow_html.js: toggleOk=true, englishCjkLeaks=[]; dynamic-content CJK leak scan in EN mode: 0 leaks; ZH→EN→ZH round-trip OK
verification.rwd: 320px / 768px / 1280px: no horizontal page overflow (390px verified in prior round)
verification.offline_packaging: no CDN dependencies; local-first fonts with system fallbacks; charts are DOM/CSS (no external chart lib)
verification.print: @media print hides controls, keeps static chart state with print-color-adjust

limitations: captions recompute from data.json at load; if data.json fails to load, charts and captions are absent (explicit error message shown)
accent #2ec4b6 on white is ~2.2:1 contrast; counts are always duplicated as text labels so no information is color-only
